summary: School Detail Page Redesign Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Premium Apple/Notion-style design implemented with hero section, 'Why This School' fit bullets, merged Quick Snapshot stats, Opportunity & Risk section, simplified Coaching Staff list, compact Program Details, and ochre accents throughout.

issues: Green color classes detected in sidebar/navigation area (text-green, bg-green) - not in the redesigned school detail content area. This is existing sidebar styling, not part of the redesign scope.

critical_code_review_comments: Hero section correctly displays large school name, subtle metadata, AI summary, match score ring with ochre color, and CTAs
'Why This School' section properly constructs fit bullets from scorecard data and match sub_scores
Quick Snapshot shows all merged stats (tuition, acceptance, students, graduation, retention, student-faculty, SAT, ACT, etc.)
'Opportunity & Risk' section correctly built from match_score, confidence, and risk_badges
Match Breakdown section shows sub-score bars with ochre color for schools on board
Coaching Staff renders as clean list (not cards) with name, role, and email
Program Details shows division, conference, mascot, school type, scholarship, region
'Add to Pipeline' button functionality works correctly - adds school to board and updates state
'On Your Board' state renders correctly for schools already on board
All sections have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Ochre accent color (#8B3F1F) used consistently throughout the page
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Detail Page redesign is complete and working. All sections render correctly: Hero (school name, metadata, AI summary, match ring, CTAs), Why This School (fit bullets), Quick Snapshot (stats grid), Opportunity & Risk, Match Breakdown (sub-score bars), Coaching Staff (list format), Program Details. Add to Pipeline functionality works. Ochre accents (#8B3F1F) used throughout. No green UI in school detail content.
